lex.bot.botlocale.Description.Docs: A description of the bot locale. Use this to help identify the bot locale in lists.

lex.bot.botlocale.Intents.Docs: One or more intents defined for the locale.

lex.bot.botlocale.LocaleId.Docs: The identifier of the language and locale that the bot will be used in. The string must match one of the supported locales.

lex.bot.botlocale.NluConfidenceThreshold.Docs: Determines the threshold where Amazon Lex will insert the AMAZON.FallbackIntent, AMAZON.KendraSearchIntent, or both when returning alternative intents. You must configure an AMAZON.FallbackIntent. AMAZON.KendraSearchIntent is only inserted if it is configured for the bot.

lex.bot.botlocale.SlotTypes.Docs: One or more slot types defined for the locale.

lex.bot.botlocale.VoiceSettings.Docs: Identifies the Amazon Polly voice used for audio interaction with the user.
